rationale: Educ. Code §39.081 defines 'parent' and 'system' for a financial accountability rating subchapter. It has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote:
Sec. 39.081. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "Parent" includes a guardian or other person having lawful control of a student.
(2) "System" means a financial accountability rating system developed under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
